content.intro: Starting a V2 reference is done directly from an approved offer in Offers V2. The system handles sending the secure form link to the applicant and tracking their progress in real time.

steps.title: Go to Offers V2
steps.content: Navigate to Offers V2 from the sidebar and find the offer you want to reference. The offer must be in an approved status before referencing can begin.

steps.title: Click Start Reference
steps.content: Click 'Start Reference' on the approved offer. The system creates a V2 reference record and links it to the offer automatically.

steps.title: Applicant Receives Secure Form Link
steps.content: The applicant is sent an email with a secure, personalised link to their reference form. They do not need to create an account — the link takes them directly to their form.

steps.title: Applicant Completes the Form
steps.content: The applicant fills in four sections online: employment and income details, landlord reference, identity documents (ID), and any additional information requested.

steps.title: Track Progress in References V2
steps.content: Go to References V2 in the sidebar to see all active V2 references. Statuses are: Sent (link delivered, not started), In Progress (applicant has started), Awaiting Evidence (more documents needed), and Complete.

steps.title: Review Evidence and Report
steps.content: Click any reference to view the full evidence submitted by the applicant, all documents, and the Creditsafe credit report. You can take notes and flag any concerns from this view.

sections.title: Live Progress Indicator
sections.content: References V2 shows a live progress indicator for each applicant, so you can see exactly which section of the form they are currently completing — no need to chase them for updates.
